architecture.value: Python package (platform-independent), targets Ascend NPU hardware for deployment

build_commands.value: ./build.sh (runs scripts/generate_proto.sh, then python -m pip wheel . --no-deps --use-pep517 -w dist)

sample_commands.value: examples/ requires NPU hardware and K8s cluster (Atlas 800I A2/A3 servers, Ascend NPU drivers, MindCluster components)

execution_log.error: Docker Hub timeout - used local cached image
execution_log.note: Image was already present as docker.1ms.run/library/ubuntu:24.04

execution_log.command: apt-get update && apt-get install -y python3 python3-pip python3-venv
pip install psutil fastapi uvicorn[standard] pydantic msgspec requests httpx watchdog
execution_log.note: Used Aliyun pip mirror (https://mirrors.aliyun.com/pypi/simple/) due to network conditions

execution_log.action: Install Python dependencies (batch 2: gRPC, test, utility)
execution_log.command: pip install grpcio grpcio-tools pyOpenSSL pytest-asyncio pytest pytest-xdist pytest-cov setproctitle pyzmq

execution_log.action: Install Python dependencies (batch 3: k8s, kafka, opentelemetry)
execution_log.command: pip install kubernetes confluent_kafka opentelemetry-exporter-otlp-proto-http opentelemetry-exporter-otlp-proto-grpc

execution_log.output: Successfully installed 15 packages (numpy-2.4.4, tokenizers, transformers-5.8.0, etc.)
execution_log.error: WARNING: Connection timed out while downloading tokenizers - retry succeeded

execution_log.output:
Generating protobuf files...
3 proto files generated (auth.proto, kv.proto, rpc.proto)
Building wheel package with pip wheel (PEP517)...
Successfully built motor-0.1.0-py3-none-any.whl (496K)
Examples require NPU hardware (Ascend NPU drivers, npu-smi) and K8s cluster with MindCluster components
execution_log.error: Cannot run examples without NPU hardware and K8s cluster
execution_log.note: examples/deployer requires Ascend NPU server hardware, K8s cluster, and model weights. This is a deployment-focused project, not a local-sample project.

execution_log.command: docker stop verification-env && docker rm verification-env

process_timeline.action: Read README.md, contributing.md, setup.py, requirements.txt, build.sh, pytest.ini, environment_preparation.md, quick_start.md, run_tests.sh
Started Ubuntu 24.04 container with repo mounted at /workspace
Installed Python 3.12.3, created venv, installed all requirements from requirements.txt in 4 batches using Aliyun pip mirror
Ran build.sh - generated protobuf files, built wheel package
Skipped - requires NPU hardware and K8s cluster

sample.reason: Examples require Ascend NPU hardware (Atlas 800I A2/A3 servers with NPU drivers) and K8s cluster with MindCluster components (Ascend Docker Runtime, Ascend Device Plugin, Volcano, Ascend Operator). These cannot be emulated in a standard Docker container.

documentation_gaps: No standalone local build/test instructions for developers without NPU hardware - all docs focus on K8s+NPU deployment
No quickstart for local unit testing without hardware dependencies
README.md does not mention Python version requirement explicitly (only implied in setup.py as >=3.11)
No CONTRIBUTING.md content in the repo (links to external Ascend community docs)
No local development environment setup instructions (e.g., venv creation, proto generation)
requirements.txt lacks version upper bounds, which may cause compatibility issues with future package versions

problems_encountered.problem: pip install from default PyPI index was very slow/timed out from this network location
problems_encountered.solution: Configured Aliyun pip mirror (https://mirrors.aliyun.com/pypi/simple/) which resolved packages at 2-7 MB/s

problems_encountered.problem: Initial pip install hung with zombie pip processes
problems_encountered.solution: Killed stuck processes, recreated venv, upgraded pip to latest version, installed packages in batches

problems_encountered.problem: tokenizers package download timeout during transformers installation
problems_encountered.solution: pip auto-retried and completed the download on second attempt

problems_encountered.problem: Examples/samples cannot be run without NPU hardware and K8s cluster
problems_encountered.solution: Noted as not_applicable - this is a deployment-focused project that requires specific hardware
problems_encountered.source: docs/zh/user_guide/environment_preparation.md - requires npu-smi, kubectl, Ascend Docker Runtime, MindCluster components
